Package com.airtribe.meditrack.util

Class Validator

java.lang.Object
com.airtribe.meditrack.util.Validator
public class Validator extends Object
Utility class for data validation.

  • Method Details

    • isValidEmail

      public static boolean isValidEmail(String email)
      Validate email format.
      Parameters:
      email - the email to validate
      Returns:
      true if valid, false otherwise

    • isValidPhoneNumber

      public static boolean isValidPhoneNumber(String phoneNumber)
      Validate phone number format (10 digits).
      Parameters:
      phoneNumber - the phone number to validate
      Returns:
      true if valid, false otherwise

    • isNotEmpty

      public static boolean isNotEmpty(String value)
      Validate if a string is not null or empty.
      Parameters:
      value - the value to validate
      Returns:
      true if valid, false otherwise

    • isPositive

      public static boolean isPositive(double value)
      Validate if a number is positive.
      Parameters:
      value - the value to validate
      Returns:
      true if positive, false otherwise

    • isNonNegative

      public static boolean isNonNegative(double value)
      Validate if a number is non-negative.
      Parameters:
      value - the value to validate
      Returns:
      true if non-negative, false otherwise

    • validateOrThrow

      public static void validateOrThrow(boolean condition, String errorMessage) throws InvalidDataException
      Validate and throw exception if data is invalid.
      Parameters:
      condition - the condition to check
      errorMessage - the error message
      Throws:
      InvalidDataException - if condition is false
